intro: Cleisostoma callosilobum, also known as Callophycus callosilobum, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease.
